name: Synchrona authenticated full website flow
description: Log in with the supplied test account and verify the core authenticated Synchrona workflow across dashboard, room creation, timeline, tasks, and budget.

planSteps.expected: The Synchrona sign-in form loads without a server error.

planSteps.description: Enter carlospeter582011@gmail.com in the email field and K@ko2011 in the password field, then submit the form.
planSteps.expected: Authentication succeeds and the browser lands on the dashboard.

planSteps.description: Verify the dashboard title 'My Event Rooms' and the 'New room' button are visible.
Create a new event room titled 'TestSprite Full Site Event' with description 'Automated full website verification' and a total budget cap of 1200.
planSteps.expected: The room is created and the browser navigates to the room workspace.

planSteps.description: Verify the room workspace renders the room title, secure slug, host role indicator, timeline tab, tasks tab, budget tab, and participant sidebar.
planSteps.expected: The room shell and RBAC host controls are visible.

planSteps.description: On the timeline tab, add a day titled 'Arrival Day' with date 2026-08-10.
planSteps.expected: The new day appears in the timeline.

planSteps.description: Add an activity to Arrival Day titled 'Welcome Dinner' with description 'Team kickoff dinner', cost 250, location 'Main Hall', and status Proposed.
planSteps.expected: The activity appears under Arrival Day with the proposed status and cost.

planSteps.description: Create a voting poll for Welcome Dinner with options 'Main Hall Buffet' and 'Rooftop Dinner', then vote for one option.
planSteps.expected: The poll renders live vote counts or bars and records the vote.

planSteps.description: Open the Tasks tab, create a task titled 'Confirm catering' with due date 2026-08-01 and high priority, then mark it complete.
planSteps.expected: The task appears, can be checked complete, and the task progress updates.
The budget dashboard shows Total Budget Cap, Total Allocated, Confirmed, Remaining, budget usage, and the Welcome Dinner cost breakdown.

planSteps.description: Verify no unhandled application error, 500 page, missing Supabase configuration warning, or blocked auth confirmation message is visible.
planSteps.expected: The authenticated full-site workflow completes without visible fatal errors.
